ticket_goal: Align Activity Hub progress bar test-ids with E2E expectations

context.problem: Mismatch between E2E test (upload-visibility.spec.ts) expecting data-testid="progress-bar-youtube" and implementation in PlatformResultItem.tsx which uses a CSS class.

context.verification_outcomes: Pass - All 22 E2E tests in upload-visibility.spec.ts passed after fix.
